reasoning: The control SC-7(26) focuses on boundary protection, specifically prohibiting unauthorized connections to classified systems. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network policies are in place to deny all ingress and egress traffic by default, thus preventing unauthorized access. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring that Ingress resources have TLS enabled can help secure the boundary by limiting exposure and encrypting data in transit.
